characters.description: One of seven former Tower climbers establishing a new world together. Max shares leadership of the human capital with his wife, Tanila, while the founders connect their peoples to a common divine system.
characters.name: Max Hoste

characters.description: An elven world champion, one of the seven founders, and Max's wife. She shares the human capital with him as the group begins creating and guiding its peoples. Their marriage makes the new divine undertaking a family responsibility as well as a joint mission.
characters.name: Tanila

characters.description: A dwarven world champion and one of the seven founders of the new world. She is part of the close group jointly responsible for its peoples and development. Like the other champions, she is linked to a created race whose progress contributes to divine growth.
characters.name: Batrire

characters.description: A dwarven world champion and one of the seven allies founding the new world. He begins this divine undertaking alongside Batrire and their longtime companions. The group's shared system ties his future advancement to the progress of the people under his care.
characters.name: Fowl Hammerfall

characters.description: An elven world champion and member of the seven-person founding group. She helps establish the shared world and assumes responsibility for one of its created peoples. She enters godhood within a cooperative structure that gives every capital its own herald.
characters.name: Cordelia

characters.description: A dragon world champion and one of the seven founders of the new world. He represents the dragons as the group begins creating and guiding its peoples.
characters.name: Rakonath

characters.description: A demon world champion and one of the seven founders of the new world. He shares responsibility for creating the world and guiding its demon people.
characters.name: Bound demon companion

characters.description: A rabbit-shaped administrative assistant assigned to System 401. The helper guides the seven founders through world design and explains the first rules governing divine points, protection, champions, and arenas.
characters.name: System helper

characters.description: Max's adviser, who warns that Max must advance rapidly before outside threats can reach the new world and endanger his family. Bob urges him to seek a much higher divine tier during the available protection period.
characters.name: Bob

characters.description: An enchantress serving as the bound demon companion's herald. She administers his proclamations and carries out his early requests for resources as he begins reorganizing the demon capital.
characters.name: Demon herald

characters.description: The newborn child of Max and Tanila, carried by Tanila during the Tower ascent. Her unusual sensitivity to System magic is apparent immediately, leaving her parents concerned that distant gods may notice her significance or regard her as a threat.
characters.name: Max and Tanila's daughter

characters.description: A long-lived arena challenger who controls many worlds and has extensive experience fighting other gods. He targets Max after Max loses personal protection and relies on accumulated divine points to sustain his strength.
characters.name: Rock-bodied god

characters.description: Max's chosen human bloodline heir and the appointed king of the human capital. His transformation gives him greater physical power, and he pledges to serve both the people and Max.
characters.name: Human king

characters.description: A neighboring water-domain goddess who protects two aquatic peoples sharing an underwater world. She asks Max to help defend them from an approaching tier-seven god.
characters.name: Aquatic goddess

characters.description: A tier-seven god preparing to claim the underwater world shared by the aquatic goddess and the two peoples under her protection.
characters.name: Tier-seven invader

characters.description: A powerful water god preparing to invade the underwater world shared by two aquatic peoples. The aquatic goddess expects him to arrive with forces from his own world and asks Max to help organize the defense.
characters.name: Tier-seven leviathan

characters.description: A huge lava-domain demon reached by Max's summoning spell and connected to the bound demon companion's past. The spell prevents him from attacking Max, and his attempts to violate that protection leave him owing a System-enforced debt.
characters.name: Demon king

characters.description: A flying god whom Max challenges despite reports of an ability that can alter reality. His unknown magic and aerial advantage make the coming arena encounter difficult for Max and his allies to predict.
characters.name: Crow god

characters.description: A disciplined six-armed demon chosen as the bound demon companion's bloodline heir and daughter. She becomes queen of the demon people and is charged with enforcing reforms based on cooperation.
characters.name: Demon queen

characters.description: A dwarf fighter selected by Fowl and Batrire to rule their capital alongside his healer wife. The married pair receive divine bloodlines and sparks and are charged with leading dwarven dungeon and Tower efforts.
characters.name: Dwarven king

characters.description: A dwarf healer selected by Fowl and Batrire to rule their capital alongside her fighter husband. The married pair receive divine bloodlines and sparks and are charged with leading dwarven dungeon and Tower efforts.
characters.name: Dwarven queen

characters.description: A resilient elven fighter appointed by Cordelia as the first queen of Ember Grove. After surviving a mental assault and protecting her dungeon party, she receives Cordelia's bloodline and a divine spark that can extend a protective ward across the capital.
characters.name: Elven queen

characters.description: A juvenile red dragon who brings Rakonath a fish before joining the younger dragons' flight instruction.
characters.name: Red dragon companion

characters.description: An elder blue dragon appointed by Rakonath to lead a new guardian flight. The alpha is responsible for selecting representatives from different age groups to share Rakonath's bloodline spark as the dragons prepare to defend others.
characters.name: Dragon flight alpha

characters.description: An immense demon drawn into Max's summoning domain during his daughter's catastrophic awakening. The entity recognizes Max, claims to have been waiting for him, and appears while an unknown force is threatening the child's life.
characters.name: Immense summoned demon

characters.description: The immense summoned demon is Death, one of the Nine. Bob warns that Max cannot defeat this primordial entity, which threatens Max's daughter and claims sole power to release her from the awakening trap.
characters.name: Death

characters.description: The frontline demon warrior in the five-person cross-kingdom champion party. Linked rings connect the warrior with Max and Tanila's daughter, a red dragon, a dwarf healer, and an elven elemental mage as they prepare for the Tower.
characters.name: Champion party demon warrior

characters.description: The dwarf healer in the five-person cross-kingdom champion party. Linked rings connect the healer with Max and Tanila's daughter, a red dragon, a demon warrior, and an elven elemental mage as they prepare for the Tower.
characters.name: Champion party dwarven healer

characters.description: The elemental mage in the five-person cross-kingdom champion party. Linked rings connect the mage with Max and Tanila's daughter, a red dragon, a demon warrior, and a dwarf healer as they prepare for the Tower.
characters.name: Champion party elven mage

characters.description: The tier-four authority among four avian gods attacking people on a world claimed by Max. The owl-like god detects Max's arrival, stops the massacre when he approaches openly, and takes control of the negotiation.
characters.name: Owl-like avian god

characters.description: An aggressive avian god participating in the assault on people tied to Max's claim. The falcon god confronts Max during the attempted settlement but answers to the stronger owl-like leader, who can halt the attack and control the negotiation.
characters.name: Falcon god

characters.description: The red dragon companion in the five-member champion party led by Max and Tanila's daughter. Shalespark can assume a red-haired humanoid form and joins the group as it prepares for the dangerous dungeons before the Tower.
characters.name: Shalespark

characters.description: Max and Tanila's daughter, who leads a party of five chosen champions. The gods equip the group and permit them to pursue two dangerous dungeon rewards ahead of the Tower.
characters.name: Mirana

characters.description: An immense gold dragon who controls a boon in a dangerous pre-Tower dungeon. He first offers the champion party its reward without battle, then makes the death of its dragon member the condition for receiving it.
characters.name: Gold dragon god

characters.description: A trusted divine ally who summons Max for a confidential meeting after learning of the gold dragon's interest. Restrictions prevent an ordinary explanation, so he seeks a safer way to share what he knows.
characters.name: Human god adviser

characters.description: A longstanding ally of the human god adviser. He joins the restricted meeting when the gold dragon is mentioned and helps devise a written method for communicating information that cannot safely be spoken.
characters.name: Dwarven god adviser

characters.description: The current leader of Max's former Golden Axe faction, having succeeded Everett after his death. Tom recognizes Max beneath his disguise during a secret return and quietly directs him toward his family without exposing the visit.
characters.name: Tom

characters.description: Max's sister, reunited with him beside their dying mother during his covert return. Fifteen local years have passed, and Stacy now has children in her household and signs of growing personal power.
characters.name: Stacy

characters.description: Max's mother, whom he finds near death after making a prohibited return to his original world.
characters.name: Max's mother

characters.description: A world-eating god who renews an earlier challenge against Max and threatens another of his worlds. The helper identifies this kind of opponent as a danger that most gods would avoid confronting directly.
characters.name: Void god challenger

characters.description: An elderly gnome who tends a world previously rescued by Max and speaks for its four protectors. He takes Max into a private discussion about the promised reward and Max's request for help against a void god.
characters.name: Elderly gnome caretaker

characters.description: Max's returning contact on a world he previously saved, now serving in a comfortable official position. The dwarf reports turnover among the council and cautions that its new members might ask Max to substantiate his claim.
characters.name: Dwarf liaison

characters.description: An arena official who detects Max's false black-hole-bomb threat after the void god surrenders. The administrator agrees to conceal the bluff if Max accepts the badly damaged world awarded by the match.
characters.name: Arena administrator
